title: [CI:DOCS]First pass at review comments
body:
Tackling the first comments in the review pass.  More to come.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>
Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: The images job seems to fail on many PRs at the moment, so I guess that's unrelated. But we should investigate.
LGTM other than the other comments
fixed up and ready for merge
